homepage.heroSubline: Protecting homes and businesses across the metro area with superior roofing solutions. Experienced professionals delivering quality craftsmanship and lasting results.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Integrity, Roofing Omaha Since 2012
aboutText: Blu-Roofing started with a simple mission: to provide Omaha with honest, reliable roofing services. We saw a need for contractors who prioritized quality and customer satisfaction above all else, and we've been committed to that vision ever since.

Our approach is straightforward. We assess your roofing needs thoroughly, provide clear and transparent estimates, and execute the work with precision and care. We believe in open communication and keeping you informed every step of the way.

We're proud to be a part of the Omaha community. We actively support local initiatives and are dedicated to building strong relationships with our neighbors. When you choose Blu-Roofing, you're choosing a company invested in the well-being of our city.

valueProps.title: Experienced Craftsmen
valueProps.description: Our team consists of highly skilled and trained roofing professionals with years of experience in the Omaha climate.

valueProps.title: Quality Materials
valueProps.description: We only use premium roofing materials from trusted manufacturers to ensure durability and longevity.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide detailed and accurate estimates with no hidden fees or surprises.

valueProps.title: Customer Satisfaction
valueProps.description: Our priority is your complete satisfaction. We stand behind our work and strive to exceed your expectations.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation roofing inspection and estimate. Call Blu-Roofing now!

services.name: Roof Replacement
services.shortDescription: Complete roof replacement services for lasting protection and enhanced curb appeal.
services.description: Is your roof showing signs of age, damage, or wear? Blu-Roofing provides comprehensive roof replacement services to safeguard your home and protect your investment. We handle everything from initial inspection and material selection to tear-off, installation, and cleanup. We understand the unique challenges of Omaha's climate, from the harsh winters and blizzards to the intense summer heat and severe thunderstorms. Our team will recommend the best roofing materials for your home, ensuring optimal performance and longevity. We work with a variety of roofing systems, including asphalt shingles, metal roofing, and tile, and we'll help you choose the option that best suits your needs and budget. Our skilled installers adhere to the highest industry standards, ensuring a seamless and durable roof replacement that will withstand the test of time. We'll manage the entire project efficiently and professionally, minimizing disruption to your daily life. We are committed to exceeding your expectations and providing you with a roof that will protect your home for years to come.
process: Step 1: Thorough roof inspection and assessment
Step 2: Material selection and customized proposal
Step 3: Safe and efficient tear-off of existing roof
Step 4: Professional installation of new roofing system

faq.question: How long does a roof replacement typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of a roof replacement depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most residential replacements can be completed in 1-3 days.

faq.question: What type of roofing material is best for Omaha's climate?
faq.answer: Asphalt shingles are a popular and cost-effective choice for Omaha homes. Metal roofing offers superior durability and longevity, while tile provides a unique aesthetic appeal.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a roof replacement?
faq.answer: Signs of a failing roof include missing or damaged shingles, leaks, water stains on ceilings, and excessive granule loss. A professional inspection can determine the extent of the damage and recommend the best course of action.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert roof repair services to address leaks, damage, and other roofing issues.
services.description: Don't let a minor roof problem turn into a major headache. Blu-Roofing offers prompt and reliable roof repair services to address leaks, damaged shingles, and other issues that can compromise the integrity of your roof. We understand the urgency of roof repairs, especially after severe weather events like hailstorms or high winds. Our team is available to provide emergency repairs to prevent further damage to your home. Whether you have a small leak around a chimney flashing or a large area of missing shingles, we have the expertise to diagnose the problem and provide an effective solution. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting repair. We work on all types of roofs, including asphalt shingle, metal, and tile roofs. Our goal is to restore the integrity of your roof and protect your home from the elements. We provide transparent pricing and detailed explanations of the repair process, so you can make informed decisions about your roofing needs. We are committed to providing exceptional service and ensuring your complete satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Detailed inspection to locate the source of the problem
Step 2: Securely protect the area to prevent further damage
Step 3: Repair or replace damaged materials
Step 4: Thorough cleanup of the area

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a roof repair request?
faq.answer: We understand the urgency of roof repairs and strive to respond to all requests as quickly as possible, especially in emergency situations.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency roof repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency roof repair services to address urgent issues like leaks and storm damage.

faq.question: How much does a roof repair typically cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a roof repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of materials needed. We provide free estimates with transparent pricing.

services.name: Gutter Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive gutter services, including installation, repair, and cleaning.
services.description: Protect your home from water damage with Blu-Roofing's comprehensive gutter services. We offer gutter installation, repair, and cleaning to ensure your gutters are functioning properly and effectively channeling water away from your foundation. We understand the importance of properly functioning gutters in Omaha's climate, where heavy rainfall and snowmelt can cause significant damage to homes. We install seamless aluminum gutters, which are durable, low-maintenance, and aesthetically pleasing. We also offer gutter guards to prevent leaves and debris from clogging your gutters, reducing the need for frequent cleaning. Our gutter repair services address issues like leaks, sagging, and damaged downspouts. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a long-lasting repair. Regular gutter cleaning is essential to prevent clogs and maintain proper water flow. Our team will remove leaves, debris, and other obstructions from your gutters, ensuring they are functioning optimally. We provide transparent pricing and detailed explanations of our gutter services, so you can make informed decisions about your home's needs.
process: Step 1: Inspection of current gutter system
Step 2: Removal of old gutters (if replacing)
Step 3: Installation of new seamless gutters or repair of existing ones
Step 4: Cleanup and inspection of area

faq.question: How often should I clean my gutters?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your gutters at least twice a year, typically in the spring and fall, to prevent clogs and maintain proper water flow.

faq.question: What are the benefits of seamless gutters?
faq.answer: Seamless gutters are more durable, less prone to leaks, and aesthetically pleasing compared to traditional sectional gutters.

faq.question: Do you offer gutter guards?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer gutter guards to prevent leaves and debris from clogging your gutters, reducing the need for frequent cleaning.

services.name: Storm Damage Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable storm damage repair services to restore your roof and protect your home.
services.description: Omaha's weather can be unpredictable, and severe storms can cause significant damage to roofs. Blu-Roofing offers fast and reliable storm damage repair services to restore your roof and protect your home from further damage. We understand the stress and disruption that storm damage can cause, and we are committed to providing prompt and efficient service. Our team is experienced in handling all types of storm damage, including hail damage, wind damage, and water damage. We will conduct a thorough inspection of your roof to assess the extent of the damage and provide a detailed estimate for repairs. We work directly with your insurance company to streamline the claims process and ensure you receive the compensation you deserve. Our skilled technicians will repair or replace damaged shingles, flashing, and other roofing components, restoring the integrity of your roof. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting repair. We are committed to providing exceptional service and ensuring your complete satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Emergency tarping service to prevent further damage
Step 2: Detailed roof inspection and documentation of damage
Step 3: Coordination with insurance company
Step 4: Professional repair or replacement of damaged roofing components

faq.question: What should I do if my roof is damaged in a storm?
faq.answer: Contact Blu-Roofing immediately for emergency tarping services to prevent further damage. We will also conduct a thorough inspection and provide a detailed estimate for repairs.

faq.question: Do you work with insurance companies?
faq.answer: Yes, we work directly with your insurance company to streamline the claims process and ensure you receive the compensation you deserve.

faq.question: How long does it take to repair storm damage?
faq.answer: The duration of storm damage repair depends on the extent of the damage. We will provide a realistic timeline after conducting a thorough inspection.

services.name: Roof Inspections
services.shortDescription: Thorough roof inspections to identify potential problems and ensure roof health.
services.description: Protect your investment with Blu-Roofing's thorough roof inspection services. Regular roof inspections are essential to identify potential problems early and prevent costly repairs down the road. Our experienced inspectors will conduct a comprehensive assessment of your roof, looking for signs of damage, wear, and deterioration. We will check for missing or damaged shingles, leaks, cracks, and other issues that can compromise the integrity of your roof. We use advanced technology, including drone photography, to inspect hard-to-reach areas and provide a detailed report of our findings. Our inspection reports include photos and clear explanations of any issues we identify. We will also provide recommendations for repairs or maintenance to ensure your roof remains in optimal condition. Whether you are buying or selling a home, or simply want to ensure your roof is in good shape, Blu-Roofing's roof inspection services provide valuable peace of mind.
process: Step 1: Visual inspection of roof surface
Step 2: Inspection of flashing, chimneys, and vents
Step 3: Assessment of attic ventilation
Step 4: Detailed report with photos and recommendations

faq.question: How often should I have my roof inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your roof inspected at least once a year, and after any major storm events.

faq.question: What is included in a roof inspection?
faq.answer: Our roof inspections include a visual inspection of the roof surface, flashing, chimneys, vents, and attic ventilation. We also provide a detailed report with photos and recommendations.

faq.question: Do you offer free roof inspections?
faq.answer: We offer free preliminary roof inspections. A comprehensive inspection with a detailed report may incur a fee.

services.name: Commercial Roofing
services.shortDescription: Expert commercial roofing services for businesses in Omaha and surrounding areas.
services.description: Blu-Roofing provides expert commercial roofing services for businesses in Omaha and the surrounding areas. We understand the unique needs of commercial properties and offer a full range of services, including roof installation, repair, and maintenance. We work with a variety of commercial roofing systems, including flat roofs, metal roofs, and TPO roofs. Our experienced team is equipped to handle projects of all sizes, from small repairs to complete roof replacements. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and long-lasting roof for your business. We understand the importance of minimizing disruption to your business operations during roofing projects. Our team will work efficiently and professionally to complete the project on time and within budget. We are committed to providing exceptional service and ensuring your complete satisfaction. From the Old Market to the outskirts of the metro, we're ready to serve your business.
process: Step 1: Detailed assessment of commercial roofing needs
Step 2: Customized proposal and material selection
Step 3: Professional installation or repair
Step 4: Ongoing maintenance and support

faq.question: What types of commercial roofing systems do you work with?
faq.answer: We work with a variety of commercial roofing systems, including flat roofs, metal roofs, and TPO roofs.

faq.question: Do you offer roof maintenance programs for commercial properties?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer customized roof maintenance programs to help you protect your investment and extend the lifespan of your roof.

faq.question: How do you minimize disruption to business operations during roofing projects?
faq.answer: We work efficiently and professionally to complete the project on time and within budget, minimizing disruption to your business operations.

As a local roofing company, we understand the unique challenges that Omaha homeowners face, from harsh winters to severe summer storms. We are committed to providing reliable and durable roofing solutions that protect your home and family for years to come.

Our team of experienced professionals offers a full range of roofing services, including roof repair, roof replacement, and new roof installation. We use only the highest quality materials and employ the latest techniques to ensure that your roof is built to last. Whether you need a minor repair or a complete roof overhaul, Blu-Roofing is here to help.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Blu-Roofing was fantastic! We had a leak after a bad storm, and they came out the next day to patch it up. They were professional, courteous, and the repair was done quickly and effectively. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David M.
reviews.text: The Blu-Roofing team installed new gutters on my house in Dundee. The installation was smooth, and the crew was very efficient. There was a slight delay in scheduling, but overall, I'm happy with the quality of the work.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We needed a full roof replacement after years of wear and tear. Blu-Roofing provided a competitive quote and excellent service. They were very communicative throughout the process, and the new roof looks great. The team even made sure to clean up thoroughly after the job was done. A+!

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: After a recent hailstorm, my roof was a mess. Blu-Roofing helped me navigate the insurance claim process and completed the necessary repairs quickly and professionally. They were a lifesaver!

reviews.name: Amy S.
reviews.text: Blu-Roofing performed a thorough roof inspection before we bought our new home. Their detailed report helped us identify potential problems and negotiate a fair price. Very helpful and informative.

reviews.name: Kevin R.
reviews.text: Blu-Roofing did an outstanding job on the roof of my business. They were very responsive and completed the project on time and within budget. I highly recommend them for any commercial roofing needs.
